sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48432" key="qermanth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θερμαν-τήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n48432.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">kettle</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pot for boiling water</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:89" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.89</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:66" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.66</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
